name: Valid genesis receipt
description: First receipt in a chain. action_index is 0. chain_prev MUST be SHA-256 of UTF-8 bytes of agent_id. Signature MUST verify under the test public key.
notes: chain_prev for action_index 0 MUST equal SHA-256 of UTF-8 bytes of agent_id string.
chain_self MUST equal SHA-256 of canonical JSON with chain_self and signature set to null.
signature MUST be Ed25519 over canonical JSON with signature set to null (chain_self set to computed value).
The 'COMPUTED_AT_RUNTIME' values are placeholders; conformance runners compute and compare them.
